meanings.definition: make dull or stupid or muddle with drunkenness or infatuation
be a mystery or bewildering to
examples: Got me--I don't know the answer!

meanings.definition: make senseless or dizzy by or as if by a blow
as if struck dumb with astonishment and surprise
examples: a circle of policement stood dumbfounded by her denial of having seen the accident
was thunderstruck by the news of his promotion

meanings.definition: in a state of mental numbness especially as resulting from shock
examples: he had a dazed expression on his face
lay semiconscious, stunned (or stupefied) by the blow
